prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock EA211 1.0 TSI (CHZB) turbocharged inline-3 with a forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.0mm bore, 8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a Garrett GT2259S turbocharger (0.61 A/R turbine housing) for 280whp on E30 ethanol blend, supported by a custom ECU tune via APR Stage 3+ software with flex-fuel sensor integration.

Drivetrain: Install a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (P/N 3000 950 170) and South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily clutch kit (P/N SDD360001) to handle increased torque. Replace the stock MQB-platform 6-speed manual (MQ250) with a close-ratio Quaife QKE6R2 gearbox (ratios: 3.18, 2.12, 1.54, 1.18, 0.95, 0.79) and a limited-slip differential from Drexler Motorsport (25% preload, 40% power bias).

Suspension/Handling: Convert to a fully adjustable KW Clubsport 3-way coilover kit (P/N 35231001) with 24mm front and 22mm rear adjustable sway bars from H&R (P/N 51652). Fit 17x8.5 ET35 Enkei PF07 wheels (10.5kg each) with 225/45R17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. Add a custom bolt-on front strut tower brace from 034Motorsport (P/N 034-4-150-500S) and a rear subframe reinforcement kit from Neuspeed (P/N NSP-RSB-01).
estetica: Aero: Install a custom 3-piece carbon fiber front splitter from Maxton Design (Saveiro Cross-specific, P/N MX-SAV-01) with integrated canards. Add a rear diffuser from RevoZport (P/N RZ-SAV-02) and a carbon fiber roof spoiler from Seibon (P/N CF-VW-SAV-01). Replace side skirts with aggressive overfender flares from Rocket Bunny (Pandem kit, P/N RB-VW01).

Exterior: Full respray in Volkswagen Candy White (LA7W) with a 3-stage PPG paint system. Apply a custom vinyl wrap overlay in matte black (3M 1080 W8) for the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding. Replace all badging with carbon fiber replicas from Carbonio (P/N CF-VW-001) and fit a custom LED taillight setup from VLand (P/N VL-2020).

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (P/N 381 200 5) mounted on custom floor mounts from Bride (P/N BM-01). Add a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (330mm, suede) with a NRG quick-release hub (P/N NRG-101). Install a full bolt-in roll cage from Custom Cages (Saveiro-specific, 6-point, T45 steel) and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (P/N 1.20.01).
